etymology.description: 丌 (stands) added under original basket pictogram 𠀠 -> stand for basket -> later associated with 其(其) (qí, "his") as ancient form
etymology.interpretation: 丌 originally represented the stand of a basket and served as a base in its pictogram, later becoming part of the character 其(其) (qí, "his") in its evolution. Its primary association was with physical stands or supports, reflecting its initial depiction.
